disclosure_items.clinical_fact: A hard, painless, heavy lump in one testicle present and slowly enlarging for more than eight months, deliberately not acted on out of fear and shame
trigger_question_examples: Have you noticed any changes or lumps anywhere, including the testicles or groin?
How long has the lump been there and has it changed?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: There's a hard, heavy lump in one of my testicles. It doesn't hurt. It's been there getting bigger for over eight months but I was too scared and ashamed to tell anyone.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: I didn't really want to bring the lump up... it's embarrassing and I've been terrified about what it might be.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: New, sudden, severe, unremitting lower back pain tonight, worse on movement and lying flat
trigger_question_examples: Where is the pain and how bad is it?
Did the back pain come on suddenly or build up?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My lower back is in absolute agony — it came on tonight and it's constant, the worst pain I've ever had, and moving makes it worse.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: New-onset breathlessness at rest tonight in a person with a chronic persistent cough
trigger_question_examples: Are you having any trouble breathing?
Is the breathlessness there at rest or only on effort?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I suddenly can't catch my breath, even sitting still. I've also had a cough that won't go away for a while now.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Profound unintentional weight loss and progressive weakness over the last few months
trigger_question_examples: Have you lost any weight without trying?
How has your energy and appetite been over the last few months?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've lost a lot of weight without trying over the last few months and I've got weaker and weaker — my clothes are hanging off me.

trigger_question_examples: Have you noticed any tenderness or swelling in your chest or breast area?
Any changes to your chest or nipples recently?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Now that you mention it, my chest — the breast area — has been tender and a bit swollen lately.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: A dragging sensation of heaviness low in the abdomen accompanying the scrotal heaviness
trigger_question_examples: Do you feel any heaviness, fullness or a mass in your lower belly?
Is there any dragging or fullness low in your abdomen?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: There's a dragging, heavy feeling low in my belly as well as the heaviness in my scrotum.
